# PC-002 session log — workspace launch profiles

Date: 2026-07-19

## Baseline

- Branch: `main`
- Baseline commit: `133560a50`
- `origin/main` was synchronized before implementation (`0` ahead, `0` behind).
- Existing Workspaces Gates 0–8 and PC-001 were complete.

## Discovery

- `WorkspaceEditorDialog` persisted provider/model defaults but exposed both as free-text inputs.
- Provider inventory already exposes configured state, known/live models, and per-model reasoning support.
- Workspace session preparation already pins provider/model and a non-secret workspace snapshot.
- `Hub` silently created sessions from `activeWorkspace`; no pre-submit workspace chooser existed.
- Additional folders already supported the canonical `working` kind, but the creation affordance was labeled and initialized as reference-only.
- Electron main already owns the platform home path; it was not present in the renderer's runtime configuration.

## Decisions

- Add a canonical optional workspace thinking-effort field and apply it while materializing the pinned session model config.
- Advertise model-compatible effort choices through provider inventory so the renderer does not invent provider capability.
- Preselect `chatgpt_codex` / `gpt-5.6-terra` / `medium` only for new workspace drafts; existing workspace data is never overwritten.
- Pass `os.homedir()` as non-secret runtime configuration and derive `<home>/Work` in the renderer.
- Keep the active workspace as the visible initial picker value for backward compatibility, but submit the picker value explicitly and never call `setActiveWorkspace` from the Hub.

## Validation log

- Desktop typecheck passed.
- All PC-002 Desktop files passed ESLint with zero warnings.
- Full Desktop Vitest passed: 76 files / 525 tests.
- SDK build, lint, six tests, and test typecheck passed.
- SDK workspace round-trip tests passed: 4 tests.
- Provider-capability/session targeted Rust tests passed: 3 tests.
- Gosling workspace library tests passed: 23 tests.
- `cargo fmt --check` and mandatory all-target clippy passed.
- The scoped workflow/contract audit found WFG-GOS-009; the async error-state root cause was
  repaired and its regression is included in the full Desktop suite.
- Full Desktop `lint:check` still reports only the recorded pre-existing `scroll-area.test.tsx`
  DOM-global errors and `useNavigationSessions.ts` hook warnings; no PC-002 file is implicated.
- `git diff --check` passed.

No GUI rebuild or reinstall was performed, as requested.
